subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath lifted the veil from the countenance of mysteries and revealed the hidden, treasured gem through His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کشف الستار عن وجه الاسرار و اظهر الکنز المکنون المخزون باسمه
subcodes.subjects: @importance of authoritative interpretation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mystical themes
